markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align FOSSA and GrowthX teams on content strategy, new website launch, and FOSSA registry implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FOSSA's launching a new website (fossa.com) with static pages, aiming to go live before April product launch](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [New FOSSA registry (300k+ packages) to be integrated, replacing Package Observer](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Content strategy shift: from conventional blog posts to more interactive, experience-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Immediate focus: audit new site, recommend registry rollout strategy, align on content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)

## Topics

### New Website Launch

  - [Shifting from Webflow to static page format for easier updates](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Timeline: Launch before first week of April (product launch)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [GrowthX to audit new site ASAP, provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Kevin (FOSSA) built site quickly, modern front-end monorepo architecture](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### FOSSA Registry Implementation

  - [Evolved from Package Observer concept](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [300,000+ packages represented](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Goals:](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
    1.  Integrate into new site
    2.  Get indexed for SEO
    3.  Enhance value/interactivity
  - [GrowthX to recommend phased rollout strategy](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Previous success: Conventional pillar/cluster model (600 → 5,500 weekly organic users)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Recent decline in effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2399.0)
  - [Shift focus: Text-heavy → Interactive, experience-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Leverage FOSSA's strength in content quality/accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Address weaknesses: publication frequency, interactivity](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### Target Audience Refinement

  - [Primary focus: Engineering leaders solving open-source management problems](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Secondary: Legal, compliance, security (who rely on engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [Challenge: Differentiate from "good enough" solutions (e.g., Snyk)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Recent decline in organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
  - [Engagement metrics: 1.5 pages/session, 40-50 sec avg. engagement time (lower side)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2686.0)
  - Strong ranking for some keywords (e.g., \#1 for "PCI SBOM")
  - [Need to improve: Interactivity, user experience, publication cadence](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)

### Content Quality Benchmarks

  - [Focus on fulfilling user intent efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)
  - [Balance between information delivery and interactive elements](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2635.0)
  - [Consider audience expectations (e.g., developers vs. general public)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2816.0)
  - [Experiment with different formats, apply "conversion testing mindset"](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)

## Next Steps

  - [FOSSA team to provide access: GA, Search Console, CMS (today if possible)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)
  - [GrowthX to audit new fossa.com site, provide recommendations ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Develop strategy for FOSSA registry rollout (phased approach?)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [GrowthX to build content OS (Airtable) identifying opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Align on initial content topics, begin calibration phase (tone, structure)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Schedule weekly sync meetings (GrowthX EA to coordinate)](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)
  - [GrowthX to share detailed action items in Slack channel post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/tzuoY4rqBctZJuoXvrExRE5Xqzh_3idu?tab=summary&timestamp=3623.0)
